title: curanga fel-terrae
side_effects: Curanga fel-terrae can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach cramps. Overconsumption of the plant's extract can lead to headaches, fatigue, and even temporary memory loss. In severe cases, prolonged use can cause damage to the liver and kidneys, resulting in long-term health complications. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using the Curanga fel-terrae plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
